query: 99th Academy Awards international feature eligibility new qualifying festival awards AMPAS rule change 2026

These updates are still subject to change in advance of the 2027 Oscars.
The 99th Oscars will air live on ABC on Sunday, March 14, 2026, at 7 p.m."},{"url":"https://ifta.ie/academy/ampas-international-feature.php","title":"INTERNATIONAL FEATURE FILM AWARD CRITERIA FOR 99TH ACADEMY AWARDS","content":"The filmmakers will then be put in contact with AMPAS International feature film office directly to process the official entry for the selected film title by the deadline of 30 September 2026.
The rules for the Academy Awards are available on the AMPAS website here."},{"url":"https://deadline.com/2026/05/oscar-rules-changes-2026-acting-international-film-1236878201/","title":"Oscar Rules Changes: Seismic Moves In Acting and International Film Categories","content":"The Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences has just made Oscar rule and eligibility changes in the acting and International Film categories that have to rank with the most significant in its nearly 100-year history.
Previously a film had to be the official selection chosen by the country or region, but now a non-English-language film can be submitted simply by winning a qualifying award at an international film festival.
In the International Feature Film category, there are now two ways to submit a film for consideration."},{"url":"https://awardswatch.com/sweeping-oscars-changes-academy-says-no-to-ai-opens-international-film-eligibility-allows-multiple-acting-nods-in-same-category/","title":"AwardsWatch - Sweeping Oscars Changes: Academy Says No to AI, Opens International Film Eligibility, Allows Multiple Acting Nods in Same Category","content":"May 1, 2026 — For Academy Awards consideration, a feature film must have a qualifying theatrical release between January 1, 2026, and December 31, 2026.
Two of the biggest examples in the current era have been Kate Winslet in The Reader and Revolutionary Road (both 2008), where she was submitted and won supporting actress for The Reader at the Golden Globes and Screen Actors Guild, won the Globe in lead for Road then won Best Actress at the Oscars for The Reader, and Leonardo DiCaprio in 2006 with Best Picture winner The Departed, where he was not nominated for that performance but instead for Blood Diamond.
Qualifying festivals for the 99th Oscars are the Berlin International Film Festival (Golden Bear for Best Film), Busan International Film Festival (Busan Award – Best Film Award), Cannes Film Festival (Palme d’Or), Sundance Film Festival (World Cinema Grand Jury Prize), Toronto International Film Festival (Platform Award) and Venice International Film Festival (Golden Lion).
Erik Anderson is the founder/owner and Editor-in-Chief of AwardsWatch and has always loved all things Oscar, having watched the Academy Awards since he was in single digits; making lists, rankings and predictions throughout the show.
2026 Toronto International Film Festival: New Films Starring Cate Blanchett, Mahershala Ali, Margaret Qualley, Naomi Watts Announced for TIFF51"},{"url":"https://cineuropa.org/en/newsdetail/490900/","title":"New festival pathway reshapes Oscars International ...","content":"May 5, 2026 — The eligibility window for the 99th Oscars remains unchanged, covering films released theatrically between 1 January and 31 December 2026,"}]}

{"query":"99th Academy Awards international feature eligibility new qualifying festival awards AMPAS rule change 2026","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://awardsradar.com/2026/05/01/academy-rule-changes-ban-ai-nominees-while-opening-the-acting-and-international-feature-categories","title":"Academy Rule Changes Ban AI Nominees While Opening the Acting and International Feature Categories - Awards Radar","content":"Title: Academy Rule Changes Ban AI Nominees While Opening the Acting and International Feature Categories - Awards Radar
### Year in Advance Oscar Predictions: Far Out Thoughts on What The Academy Might Be Thinking in 2027 (Part Three). ### Ranking the Best Performances to Date from Meryl Streep. Here is the press release from AMPAS with the rules for the 99th Academy Awards. In addition to tackling AI, the Acting categories can now nominate someone for two different performances, while there are ways that a country could have two nominees in Best International Feature. The Academy’s Board of Governors has approved awards rules, inclusion standards and campaign promotional regulations for the 99th Academy Awards®. For Academy Awards consideration, a feature film must have a qualifying theatrical release between **January 1, 2026, and December 31, 2026**. **Thursday, August 13, 2026**: First submission deadline for Animated Short Film, Documentary Feature Film, Documentary Short Film and Live Action Short Film categories. **Thursday, September 17, 2026**: First submission deadline for General Entry categories, Animated Feature Film, Best Picture and Representation and Inclusion Standards Entry (RAISE) form. **Wednesday, September 30, 2026**: Submission deadline for International Feature Film. **Thursday, October 8, 2026**: Final submission deadline for Animated Short Film, Documentary Short Film and Live Action Short Film categories. **Thursday, October 15, 2026**: Final submission deadline for Documentary Feature Film. **Thursday, November 12, 2026**: Final submission deadline for General Entry categories, Animated Feature Film, Best Picture and Representation and Inclusion Standards Entry (RAISE) form. The Academy also updated and clarified formatting and language in the campaign promotional regulations for the 99th Oscars. Substantive changes to the campaign promotional regulations include:. Awards Rules are formulated by the Awards Committee based on recommendations by Branch Executive Committees, the International Feature Film Executive Committee, and the Scientific and Technical Awards Executive Committee, and are subject to final approval by the Board of Governors. All rules, regulations and dates for the 99th Academy Awards are subject to change. For the complete 99th Academy Awards rules, inclusion standards and campaign promotional regulations, visit oscars.org/rules. […] The new regulations apply to films with a qualifying theatrical release between January 1, 2026, and December 31, 2026, setting the stage for a historic 99th awards ceremony.","score":0.8655088,"raw_content":null,"domain":"awardsradar.com","popularity_score":3.4153820166541116,"main_topic":"news"},{"url":"https://www.awardsdaily.com/category/99th-academy-awards/feed","title":"99th Academy Awards – Awards Daily","content":"Title: 99th Academy Awards – Awards Daily
99th Academy Awards – Awards Daily https://www.awardsdaily.com Nobody Knows Anything Fri, 01 May 2026 18:18:56 +0000 en-US  hourly   1   Academy’s New Rules for 99th Oscars – Big Change in International Feature https://www.awardsdaily.com/2026/05/01/academys-new-rules-for-99th-oscars-big-change-in-international-feature/ https://www.awardsdaily.com/2026/05/01/academys-new-rules-for-99th-oscars-big-change-in-international-feature/#comments Fri, 01 May 2026 18:18:56 +0000 https://www.awardsdaily.com/? p=229521 The Academy has released the new rules for the 99th Oscars with one really big change, which I am so happy about, as I’ve urged them to do this on multiple occasions, and that is to give the prize in International Feature to the director and not the country. This matters because a film is often entered in the International Feature and Best Picture categories. If the Director does get the Oscar, at least to my mind, that functions as a major win rather than taking away from a major studio film’s chances. I know lots of people don’t agree with me on this but the Oscars can help save Hollywood and the film business by awarding films that were produced and made by American film companies. Other rules include that actors can be nominated for multiple performances in the same category if they place in the top five votes. *LOS ANGELES, CA – The Academy’s Board of Governors has approved awards rules, inclusion standards and campaign promotional regulations for the 99th Academy Awards®.*. *For Academy Awards consideration, a feature film must have a qualifying theatrical release between January 1, 2026, and December 31, 2026.*. *In the Acting category, actors may be nominated for multiple performances in the same category if those performances place in the top five votes, which aligns with achievements in other award categories.*. *In the International Feature Film category, there are now two ways to submit a film for consideration. In addition to a film being submitted as an official selection by a country or region via the Academy-approved Selection Committees, a non-English language film can now be submitted for consideration by winning a qualifying award at an international film festival as specified in the International Feature Film Award Qualifying Festival List. *Additionally, in the International Feature Film category, the film will be credited as the nominee rather than the country or region, and the award will be accepted by the director on behalf of the film’s creative team.","score":0.85509074,"raw_content":null,"domain":"awardsdaily.com","popularity_score":4.452684785479894,"main_topic":"news"},{"url":"https://en.tempo.co/amp/2101984/oscars-set-new-limits-on-ai-for-99th-academy-awards","title":"Oscars Set New Limits on AI for 99th Academy Awards - Life & Style En.tempo.co","content":"Title: Oscars Set New Limits on AI for 99th Academy Awards - Life & Style En.tempo.co
# Oscars Set New Limits on AI for 99th Academy Awards. **TEMPO.CO, Jakarta** - The board of trustees of the Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences (AMPAS), the body behind the Oscars, has officially announced measures to safeguard the integrity of human artistry against the encroaching influence of digital technology. The institution released updated requirements on Friday, May 1, 2026, local time, redefining eligibility criteria for films seeking to compete in the upcoming 99th Academy Awards. A report from *The Hollywood Reporter* noted that the primary objective of this update is to ensure the Oscars remain a symbol of human achievement rather than the output of algorithmic calculations. This decision follows a protracted debate within Hollywood regarding the increasingly pervasive use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and its critical impact on creative professionals. In its official press release, the Academy highlighted two sectors most vulnerable to AI intervention: acting and screenwriting. Regarding acting, the new regulations state: "only roles credited in the film's legal billing and demonstrably performed by humans with their consent will be considered eligible.". This provision is vital as it addresses the legality of film credits and performer consent, aiming to prevent the use of digital replicas or deepfake technology without proper compensation or permission. Under this rule, an actor's performance must be authentic, rooted in human emotional interpretation on set. A similar stance has been adopted in the field of screenwriting. Citing a report from *People*, AMPAS now formalizes the requirement that a script must be authored by a human to be deemed eligible. The Academy has introduced a new mechanism for submissions in the International Feature Film category. However, should this pathway face obstacles, such as the absence of an approved committee, the Academy now provides a secondary route through a selection committee directly authorized by AMPAS. ## **The Road to the 2027 Academy Awards**. These fundamental shifts will set the standard for the 99th Academy Awards. The movie Sore: Istri dari Masa Depan, directed by Yandy Laurens, has been chosen to represent Indonesia at the 2026 Academy Awards. Indonesian film 'Ngeri-ngeri Sedap' has been chosen to represent the country at the 95th Academy Awards.","score":0.8506799,"raw_content":null,"domain":"tempo.co","popularity_score":5.0622936012236295,"main_topic":"news"},{"url":"https://en.tempo.co/read/2101984/oscars-set-new-limits-on-ai-for-99th-academy-awards","title":"Oscars Set New Limits on AI for 99th Academy Awards - Life & Style En.tempo.co","content":"Title: Oscars Set New Limits on AI for 99th Academy Awards - Life & Style En.tempo.co
# Oscars Set New Limits on AI for 99th Academy Awards. **TEMPO.CO, Jakarta** - The board of trustees of the Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences (AMPAS), the body behind the Oscars, has officially announced measures to safeguard the integrity of human artistry against the encroaching influence of digital technology. The institution released updated requirements on Friday, May 1, 2026, local time, redefining eligibility criteria for films seeking to compete in the upcoming 99th Academy Awards. A report from *The Hollywood Reporter* noted that the primary objective of this update is to ensure the Oscars remain a symbol of human achievement rather than the output of algorithmic calculations. This decision follows a protracted debate within Hollywood regarding the increasingly pervasive use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and its critical impact on creative professionals. ## Safeguarding the Roles of Actors and Writers. In its official press release, the Academy highlighted two sectors most vulnerable to AI intervention: acting and screenwriting. Regarding acting, the new regulations state: "only roles credited in the film's legal billing and demonstrably performed by humans with their consent will be considered eligible.". This provision is vital as it addresses the legality of film credits and performer consent, aiming to prevent the use of digital replicas or deepfake technology without proper compensation or permission. Under this rule, an actor's performance must be authentic, rooted in human emotional interpretation on set. A similar stance has been adopted in the field of screenwriting. Citing a report from *People*, AMPAS now formalizes the requirement that a script must be authored by a human to be deemed eligible. The Academy has introduced a new mechanism for submissions in the International Feature Film category. However, should this pathway face obstacles, such as the absence of an approved committee, the Academy now provides a secondary route through a selection committee directly authorized by AMPAS. ## **The Road to the 2027 Academy Awards**. These fundamental shifts will set the standard for the 99th Academy Awards. The movie Sore: Istri dari Masa Depan, directed by Yandy Laurens, has been chosen to represent Indonesia at the 2026 Academy Awards. Indonesian film 'Ngeri-ngeri Sedap' has been chosen to represent the country at the 95th Academy Awards.","score":0.84277284,"raw_content":null,"domain":"tempo.co","popularity_score":5.0622936012236295,"main_topic":"news"},{"url":"https://www.awardsdaily.com/2026/05/01/academys-new-rules-for-99th-oscars-big-change-in-international-feature","title":"Academy’s New Rules for 99th Oscars – Big Change in International Feature – Awards Daily","content":"Title: Academy’s New Rules for 99th Oscars – Big Change in International Feature – Awards Daily
# Academy’s New Rules for 99th Oscars – Big Change in International Feature. Academy’s New Rules for 99th Oscars – Big Change in International Feature. The Academy has released the new rules for the 99th Oscars with one really big change, which I am so happy about, as I’ve urged them to do this on multiple occasions, and that is to give the prize in International Feature to the director and not the country. This matters because a film is often entered in the International Feature and Best Picture categories. If the Director does get the Oscar, at least to my mind, that functions as a major win rather than taking away from a major studio film’s chances. I know lots of people don’t agree with me on this but the Oscars can help save Hollywood and the film business by awarding films that were produced and made by American film companies. Other rules include that actors can be nominated for multiple performances in the same category if they place in the top five votes. *LOS ANGELES, CA – The Academy’s Board of Governors has approved awards rules, inclusion standards and campaign promotional regulations for the 99th Academy Awards®.*. *In the Acting category, actors may be nominated for multiple performances in the same category if those performances place in the top five votes, which aligns with achievements in other award categories.*. *Additionally, in the Acting category, only roles credited in the film’s legal billing and demonstrably performed by humans with their consent will be considered eligible.*. *In the International Feature Film category, there are now two ways to submit a film for consideration. In addition to a film being submitted as an official selection by a country or region via the Academy-approved Selection Committees, a non-English language film can now be submitted for consideration by winning a qualifying award at an international film festival as specified in the International Feature Film Award Qualifying Festival List. *Additionally, in the International Feature Film category, the film will be credited as the nominee rather than the country or region, and the award will be accepted by the director on behalf of the film’s creative team.","score":0.83742094,"raw_content":null,"domain":"awardsdaily.com","popularity_score":4.452684785479894,"main_topic":"news"}],"response_time":2.98,"request_id":"1017113f-0167-47d2-8fa1-0df0ec306315"}
